attributes.description: Monitoring of interventions on OVH dedicated servers. SRE KPIs: volume, statuses, scheduling, types of actions, affected servers, and trends over time.

query.esql:
FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| STATS `Total Count` = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| STATS `Total Count` = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| STATS `Distinct Servers` = COUNT_DISTINCT(ovh_dedicated_servers.server_name)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| STATS `Distinct Servers` = COUNT_DISTINCT(ovh_dedicated_servers.server_name)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| WHERE ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention.planned == true
| STATS `Count of Interventions` = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| WHERE ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention.planned == true
| STATS `Count of Interventions` = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| WHERE ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention.planned == false
| STATS `Count of Interventions` = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| WHERE ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention.planned == false
| STATS `Count of Interventions` = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| WHERE event.outcome == "success"
| STATS `Count of Interventions` = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| WHERE event.outcome == "success"
| STATS `Count of Interventions` = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| WHERE error.message IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Count of Interventions` = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| WHERE error.message IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Count of Interventions` = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| STATS `Event Count` = COUNT(*) BY `Time Bucket` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Planned` = ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention.planned
| SORT `Time Bucket`

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| STATS `Event Count` = COUNT(*) BY `Time Bucket` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Planned` = ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention.planned
| SORT `Time Bucket`

attributes.title: Intervention Events Over Time by Planned Status

embeddableConfig.title: Intervention Events Over Time by Planned Status

query.esql:
FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| STATS `Count of Events` = COUNT(*) BY `Time Bucket` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Status` = ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention.status
| SORT `Time Bucket`

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| STATS `Count of Events` = COUNT(*) BY `Time Bucket` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Status` = ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention.status
| SORT `Time Bucket`

attributes.title: Count of Intervention Events Over Time by Status

embeddableConfig.title: Count of Intervention Events Over Time by Status

query.esql:
FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| STATS `Count` = COUNT(*) BY `Action Type` = event.action
| SORT `Count` DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| STATS `Count` = COUNT(*) BY `Action Type` = event.action
| SORT `Count` DESC
| LIMIT 10

attributes.title: Top 10 Intervention Action Types by Count

embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 Intervention Action Types by Count

query.esql:
FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| STATS `Intervention Count` = COUNT(*) BY `Status` = ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention.status
| SORT `Intervention Count` DESC

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| STATS `Intervention Count` = COUNT(*) BY `Status` = ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention.status
| SORT `Intervention Count` DESC

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `Intervention Count` = COUNT(*) BY `event.outcome`
| SORT `Intervention Count` DESC

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `Intervention Count` = COUNT(*) BY `event.outcome`
| SORT `Intervention Count` DESC

attributes.title: Distribution of Interventions by Event Outcome

embeddableConfig.title: Distribution of Interventions by Event Outcome

query.esql:
FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `Total Interventions` = COUNT(*) BY `Server Name` = ovh_dedicated_servers.server_name
| SORT `Total Interventions` DESC
| LIMIT 15

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `Total Interventions` = COUNT(*) BY `Server Name` = ovh_dedicated_servers.server_name
| SORT `Total Interventions` DESC
| LIMIT 15

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| WHERE ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention.planned == false
| STATS `Unplanned Interventions` = COUNT(*) BY `Server Name` = ovh_dedicated_servers.server_name
| SORT `Unplanned Interventions` DESC
| LIMIT 15

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| WHERE ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention.planned == false
| STATS `Unplanned Interventions` = COUNT(*) BY `Server Name` = ovh_dedicated_servers.server_name
| SORT `Unplanned Interventions` DESC
| LIMIT 15

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| EVAL `Duration (ms)` = DATE_DIFF("milliseconds", event.start, event.end)
| STATS `Average Duration (ms)` = AVG(`Duration (ms)`) BY `Time` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time`

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| EVAL `Duration (ms)` = DATE_DIFF("milliseconds", event.start, event.end)
| STATS `Average Duration (ms)` = AVG(`Duration (ms)`) BY `Time` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time`

attributes.title: Average Duration of Interventions Over Time

embeddableConfig.title: Average Duration of Interventions Over Time

query.esql:
FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| EVAL `Duration (ms)` = DATE_DIFF("milliseconds", event.start, event.end)
| STATS `Average Duration (ms)` = AVG(`Duration (ms)`) BY event.action
| SORT `Average Duration (ms)` DESC

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| EVAL `Duration (ms)` = DATE_DIFF("milliseconds", event.start, event.end)
| STATS `Average Duration (ms)` = AVG(`Duration (ms)`) BY event.action
| SORT `Average Duration (ms)` DESC

embeddableConfig.title: Average Duration of Interventions by Action Type

query.esql:
FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| KEEP @timestamp, ovh_dedicated_servers.server_name, event.action, ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention.status, ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention.planned, event.outcome, error.message
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 100

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention-default
| KEEP @timestamp, ovh_dedicated_servers.server_name, event.action, ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention.status, ovh_dedicated_servers.intervention.planned, event.outcome, error.message
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 100

attributes.title: [OVH] Dedicated Servers – Interventions
